headline: ChatGPT can now see your bank account. Is it worth the risk?
summary: ChatGPT's new personal finance experience helps you with your financial goals. Here's what to know about the risks before you link your bank accounts.

headline: Intuit Mailchimp Launches Analytics AI and Expanded Data Integrations to Give Brands Conversational, Actionable Intelligence
summary: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., May 28, 2026--Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU), the global financial technology platform that makes Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, Mailchimp, and Intuit Enterprise Suite, today announced Analytics AI*, a native conversational analytics agent in Mailchimp that connects performance across campaigns, audiences, and revenue to tell businesses what changed, why, and what to do next.
